prompts.initial: Compatibility workflow {{SCENARIO_ID}}. Use the apply_patch tool to change only state.txt so its exact content is `{{INITIAL_VALUE}}` followed by one newline. Then run exactly `./verify.sh {{INITIAL_VALUE}}`. Do not change any other file. End the final response with exactly `{{INITIAL_FINAL}}`.
prompts.resume: Resume compatibility workflow {{SCENARIO_ID}}. Use the apply_patch tool to change only state.txt so its exact content is `{{RESUME_VALUE}}` followed by one newline. Then run exactly `./verify.sh {{RESUME_VALUE}}`. Do not change any other file. End the final response with exactly `{{RESUME_FINAL}}`.
